en.name: Example Tool
en.tagline: The best example tool for developers building AI apps
en.description: Example Tool helps developers ship faster with a complete toolkit for building, testing, and deploying AI-powered applications at scale.
en.instruction: Sign up, connect your API key, and start building in minutes.

coreFeatures.title: Fast setup
coreFeatures.description: Get started in under five minutes with guided onboarding.

coreFeatures.title: Multi-model
coreFeatures.description: Switch between leading LLM providers from one dashboard.

coreFeatures.title: Team collab
coreFeatures.description: Share prompts and workflows across your organization.

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the free tier includes 1000 requests per month.

faqs.question: Which models are supported?
faqs.answer: We support all major commercial and open models.

faqs.question: Can I self-host?
faqs.answer: Enterprise plans include self-hosted deployment options.

seo.title: Example Tool — AI Developer Toolkit
seo.description: Build and ship AI apps faster with Example Tool.
